title: Competency Inventory and Independent Evidence Ledger · Decision Mastery Review
summary: A hiring panel compares near-miss decisions for competency inventory and independent evidence ledger and accepts only role-relevant, truthful, accessible, privacy-preserving, and independently defensible evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for competency-to-evidence ledger. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate course, work, community, care, creative, and self-directed experience into observable role-relevant behaviors.
Rank claim evidence by authenticity, recency, independence, changed-case performance, stakeholder relevance, and inspectability.
Distinguish personal decisions and work from collaboration, templates, tutorials, automation, generative assistance, and reviewer input.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Evidence Refresh
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A course-rich skills list cannot identify one independently reproduced behavior, changed case, personal contribution, current artifact, or honest limitation. The quiz variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Reproduce fragile or stale evidence under a changed requirement and record exact pass, failure, repair, and remaining limit.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?

Evidence target: Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Evidence Refresh.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for reproduce fragile or stale evidence under a changed requirement and record exact pass, failure, repair, and remaining limit. For Diagnose the hidden failure · Quiz Evidence Refresh, keep Evidence Refresh connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A course-rich skills list cannot identify one independently reproduced behavior, changed case, personal contribution, current artifact, or honest limitation. content.title: Fault-isolation decision
content.text: Select evidence that identifies a cause, not a patch that only hides the Evidence Refresh symptom.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing

stimulus.title: Evidence Refresh failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: Old screenshots remain current evidence if the repository still exists.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Reproduce fragile or stale evidence under a changed requirement and record exact pass, failure, repair, and remaining limit.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
Run the boundary case, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.
Accept the result because visible output is the highest authority. That claim fails the evidence boundary for Evidence Refresh.

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Competency Behavior
steps.instruction:
Order the Competency Behavior evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.
